mapper.select: SELECT n.*, nc.name AS category_name, u1.real_name AS reviewer_name, a.title AS related_activity_title FROM news n LEFT JOIN news_category nc ON n.category_id = nc.id LEFT JOIN user u1 ON n.reviewer_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN activity a ON n.related_activity_id = a.id WHERE n.id = #{id} AND n.is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO news ( title, category_id, author_id, author_name, cover_image, summary, content, source, attachments, related_activity_id, view_count, like_count, is_top, status, approval_status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{categoryId}, #{authorId}, #{authorName}, #{coverImage}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{source}, #{attachments}, #{relatedActivityId}, #{viewCount}, #{likeCount}, #{isTop}, #{status}, #{approvalStatus}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE news SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE news SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
